questions.question: In the series "Naruto", what is the name of the nine-tailed beast sealed inside Naruto Uzumaki?
questions.explanation: Kurama, also known as the Nine-Tails (Kyūbi), is the beast sealed inside Naruto at his birth.

questions.question: What is the highest-grossing anime film of all time worldwide?
questions.explanation: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba – The Movie: Mugen Train is the highest-grossing anime film of all time, grossing over $500 million.

questions.question: Which anime features brothers Edward and Alphonse Elric searching for the Philosopher's Stone?
questions.explanation: Fullmetal Alchemist follows the Elric brothers' journey to recover their bodies using alchemy.

questions.question: In "Dragon Ball Z", what alien warrior species does Goku belong to?
questions.explanation: Goku is a Saiyan sent to Earth from Planet Vegeta as a baby.

questions.question: Which iconic Studio Ghibli film features a giant, friendly grey forest spirit?
questions.explanation: My Neighbor Totoro centers on two young sisters who interact with friendly wood spirits, most notably Totoro.
